message: chore(config): enable test targets direct swift invocation

files.patch:
@@ -32,8 +32,8 @@
     {
       "name": "Commander",
       "type": "test",
-      "enabled": false,
-      "testCommand": "./runner swift test --package-path Commander",
+      "enabled": true,
+      "testCommand": "swift test --package-path Commander",
       "watchPaths": [
         "Commander/**/*.swift",
         "Commander/Package.swift"
@@ -44,8 +44,8 @@

       "watchPaths": [

         "AXorcist/Package.swift"
